307.reason: [EOF is an integer constant (typically -1) appended as a character, but the content string may not handle it correctly; it's better to use a sentinel or check for end-of-file differently]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [EOF is an integer constant (typically -1) appended as a character, but the content string may not handle it correctly; it's better to use a sentinel or check for end-of-file differently]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  EOF is an integer constant (typically -1), appending it to a std::string may cause undefined behavior or incorrect content; it should not be used as a character to mark end-of-file.

335.reason: [The error output format is reversed: expected "line number error code" but outputs "error code line number"]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The error output format is reversed: expected "line number error code" but outputs "error code line number"]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  The error list stores pairs of (char type, int line), but here i.second is the line number and i.first is the error type; the output format should be "line number error code", so the order should be i.second << ' ' << i.first.
